$comment: Optional config. Everything here has a sensible default — you can delete any key. Prices are USD per 1M tokens and are DEFAULTS you should verify against each provider's current pricing; override them here to keep cost estimates accurate.

models.$comment: Add or override any model. Matched by id; this replaces the built-in entry with the same id, or adds a new one.

tierByTask.$comment: Override the task -> tier mapping if you want. Omit to use defaults.
